name: flowchart
description: Standalone zero-JS HTML flowchart: a CSS-driven vertical node spine with kind-coded shapes (process, decision, terminal, ok, bad), labelled connectors, and a full directed-edge adjacency list with legend.

slots.description: Flow title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
One or two sentence description of what the flow charts.
Ordered flow nodes; render each as a .node card (class = kind) joined by .connector blocks.
Directed edges as .edge-row entries, including branch/loop edges off the main spine.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.nodes[]: { id: string, label: string, kind: enum[process,terminal,decision,ok,bad] }
shape.edges[]: { from: string (node id), to: string (node id), label: string (optional) }
